forecast-period.text: Mostly clear. Light winds.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Moderate

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog on the eastern slopes in the early morning. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. The chance of fog in the north in the early morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Moderate

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
No Rating
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the coast. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.

Cloud clearing. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then tending east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Clear. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Clear. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending east to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 29 to 34.
Clear. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 31.
Moderate

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.
